title: Bad Girls
album: Endless Summer (Donna Summer's Greatest Hits) [European Version]
why_this_song: Bad Girls by Donna Summer (1979) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 57 times; first heard in: "Toot, toot hey beep, beep"
Appears 54 times; first heard in: "Toot, toot hey beep, beep"
Appears 13 times; first heard in: "Bad girls"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Bad girl, sad girls"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Talking 'bout the sad girls"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

Her girl is out at night

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Bad Girls" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Bad Girls" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
